title: zanthoxylum humile
intro: Zanthoxylum humile, also known as Chilean pepper tree, is a shrub or small tree native to South America, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The medicinal properties of Zanthoxylum humile include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and alkaloids. This plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, offering benefits such as pain relief, reduced inflammation, and boosted immune system. Zanthoxylum humile can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its seeds can be used as a spice, adding flavor and heat to various culinary dishes.
